retry_reason: kref_put is unconditional and always executed; after put, the reference is gone and the object must not be reused, so retry is meaningless.
contract_summary: This function releases a reference on the rpmsg_endpoint, rendering the endpoint unusable after the call. It performs necessary cleanup (removing from the endpoint lookup table and clearing the callback) before dropping the reference via kref_put. The caller must not access the endpoint after calling this function, and should have ensured no other references exist to avoid premature freeing.
